Examples.Title: Download the audio file used for this live job
Examples.Code:
### Download the audio file used for this live job
# @name StreamingController_getAudio_v2
GET {{host}}/v2/live/{{id}}/file
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/octet-stream

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The audio file used for this live job
# Content-Type: application/octet-stream
# 401
# Description: You don't have the permissions to access this live job or its audio file
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The live job or its audio file doesn't exist or has been deleted
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Download the audio file used for this transcription job
Examples.Code:
### Download the audio file used for this transcription job
# @name TranscriptionController_getAudio_v2
GET {{host}}/v2/transcription/{{id}}/file
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json, application/octet-stream

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The audio file used for this transcription job
# Content-Type: application/octet-stream
# 401
# Description: You don't have the permissions to access this transcription job or its audio file
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The transcription job or its audio file doesn't exist or has been deleted
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get the transcription job's metadata
Examples.Code:
### Get the transcription job's metadata
# @name TranscriptionController_getTranscript_v2
GET {{host}}/v2/transcription/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: The transcription job's metadata
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: You don't have the permissions to access the transcription job
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The transcription job doesn't exist or has been deleted
# Content-Type: application/json
